@article{platt2015,
  author = {Platt, S. V.},
  title = {Una breve historia de Puerto Rico desde una mirada feminista},
  year = {2015}
}

@article{roman1991,
  author = {Román, M.},
  title = {Feminismo y postmodernidad en Puerto Rico},
  year = {1991}
}

@article{colonwarren2018,
  author = {Colón-Warren, Alice},
  title = {Investigación y acción feminista en el Puerto Rico contemporáneo},
  year = {2018}
}

@article{silva2019,
  author = {Silva Martínez, Elithet and Valle-Ferrer, Diana and Álvarez Soto, Suzette},
  title = {Narrativas de resistencia ante la violencia de género en Puerto Rico},
  year = {2019}
}

@book{bourdieu2001,
  author = {Bourdieu, Pierre},
  title = {Masculine Domination},
  publisher = {Stanford University Press},
  year = {2001}
}

@book{federici2004,
  author = {Federici, Silvia},
  title = {Caliban and the Witch: Women, the Body and Primitive Accumulation},
  publisher = {Autonomedia},
  year = {2004}
}

@article{bonilla2019,
  author = {Bonilla-Neira, Laura and Gómez-Meneses, Diana and Godoy-Pinilla, Juan},
  title = {Investigaciones y estrategias comunicativas frente a la violencia contra las mujeres en ámbitos universitarios},
  year = {2019}
}

@article{bello2025,
  author = {Bello-Urrego, Alejandra},
  title = {Colonialidad invisible y políticas del sufrimiento},
  year = {2025}
}
